problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: If Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
